description: Full-page wizard with top step indicator, centered content per step, back/next controls. Clear progress through the dispute letter generation process.

css_layout_rules..wizard-container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem; width: 100%; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
css_layout_rules..wizard-steps: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 3rem;
css_layout_rules..step-nav: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
